jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Cars24
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Frontend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
